programme.title: Parks and Recreation
programme.desc: Leslie goes on a crusade to improve park safety after Jerry is mugged, which is later discovered to be a lie. Meanwhile, Ron tries to teach the office self-defense, but winds up injuring Andy instead.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's solution to Penny's financial difficulty leads to a confrontation between Leonard and Penny's ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: A burger-loving hit man, his philosophical partner, a drug-addled gangster's moll and a washed-up boxer converge in this sprawling, comedic crime caper. Their adventures unfurl in three stories that ingeniously trip back and forth in time.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard takes part in the Pamplona Bull Run and drives the Lamborghini Murciélago Roadster. Jeremy drives the Ford F150 Lightning pick-up truck, which is inexplicably the world's best-selling car and describes it as the worst car he had ever driven.James put his degree in music to fine use by trying to re-create the Top Gear theme tune using car engines.Richard tries a bit of drifting in the Monaro with the D1 drifting team.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: This episode demonstrates the production processes for Gut Strings, Absinthe, Belt Buckles, and Lever Locks and shows how each is made.
programme.sub-title: Gut Strings, Absinthe, Belt Buckles, Lever Locks
